title: Iron Bundles
description: Higher-capacity bundles for Fabric and Minecraft 1.17.
body:
Iron Bundles adds higher-capacity bundles to Minecraft 1.17 snapshots. Each is crafted by adding the proper material to the previous tier of bundle in a smithing table.

 

This mod requires Fabric.

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/606229145298403328/784359973676646410/2020-12-04_02.04.16.png)
